goals.title: Implement the approved codex-design workflow redesign plan as five de...
goals.objective: Implement the approved codex-design workflow redesign plan as five delivery goals: 1 remove the current image generation feature from active code and UI while preserving normal image attachments; 2 make normal DesignForge design requests design-only with no automatic preview, capture, runtime test, package install, npm run typecheck, or tsc --noEmit, and update prompt/copy plus preview/verify missing-dependency behavior; 3 create DESIGN.md and redesign the app as a JetBrains Mono OpenCode-style dense 3-pane workbench with fixed composer and no image generation controls; 4 add selection-ready preview and composer-linked component editing while keeping runtime tools explicit manual actions only; 5 write the embedded ima2-gen-inspired Image Workspace architecture contract and run final build, Rust check, rg regression checks, and browser visual QA evidence. Use .omo/plans/codex-design-workflow-redesign.md as the execution source of truth. This is HEAVY work.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/data proof: after implementation run rg checks proving imagegen active paths are gone and default workflow/runtime install paths are separated; run npm run build and cargo check. PASS iff commands exit 0 and forbidden active references are absent or documented as manual-only.

Browser proof: start DesignForge frontend with npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 1420, open http://127.0.0.1:1420 at 1440x900 and 390x844, capture screenshots. PASS iff UI is JetBrains/OpenCode dense 3-pane on desktop, usable collapsed layout on mobile, fixed composer visible, no image generation controls, no text overlap.

Regression/docs proof: inspect final diff and evidence showing normal image attachments still work, runtime tools are explicit manual actions only, and docs/image-workspace-architecture.md defines an embedded ima2-gen-inspired future image workspace without exposed disabled UI. PASS iff evidence files and rg checks prove these constraints.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/task-09-manual-tools.txt and .omo/evidence/task-10-image-workspace-contract.txt plus final reviewer approval artifact

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
